name: Patrol
description:
Library component. Models the patrol scheduler that re-invokes `gt sling` for the same formula+agent on each substrate cycle. Real implementation: witness/refinery patrol-cycle loops invoke `gt sling <patrol-formula> <agent>` to keep an active hooked-mol on the patrol agent (mol-deacon-patrol, mol-witness-patrol, mol-refinery-patrol).

v0.3 (defense-doc P2.4): loose coupling. Each Patrol fires once when Agent is Resumed; multiple Patrol instances may all fire on the same Resumed window or interleave across cycles depending on TLC's exploration. The model preserves real gas-town's loose coupling -- patrols run on independent timers (witness/refinery loops), not synchronized with the substrate's compact cycles. Multiple Patrols composed in one project demonstrate accumulation across all Patrol fires regardless of which cycle they land in.

AGENT_OBSERVE.description: watches the substrate Agent. Patrol fires when agent is Resumed (substrate cycle complete).

actors.name: Patrol
actors.owner: Patrol scheduler. Pending until agent resumes; invokes gt sling once. After Slung, terminal.

triples.event: agent resumed: invoke gt sling for the same formula+agent
